calendar.matters:
UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Papina Thompson.
Arthur Rugama, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Jose Zuniga and Maria Zuniga, present with Spanish Interperter: Daun Li.
Plaintiffs and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Sipai Sipai and Fuatino Green, Judgment to be determined by the Court within one week.
Matter is submitted and under submission.
Proposed Judgment received in court.

Jan. 20, 2006
Judgment granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc.
